name: Bauernfruhstuck (Farmers Breakfast)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil unpeeled potatoes for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse under cold water, peel and set aside to cool.
3. Slice the cooled potatoes.
4. Cook bacon in a large frypan until transparent.
5. Add potato slices to the pan and cook until lightly browned.
6. In a bowl, blend eggs with milk and salt.
7. Stir in the cubed ham into the egg mixture.
8. Cut tomatoes into thin wedges and add them to the egg mixture.
9. Pour the egg mixture over the potatoes in the frypan.
10. Cook until the eggs are set.
11. Sprinkle chopped chives on top and serve immediately.
